name: Thư,
greetingText:
On this special day, as the sun rises to celebrate another year of your wonderful existence, 
I find myself overwhelmed with joy and gratitude for having you in my life.
text1:
Happy Birthday, my love! 🎉🎂 
Today is a day to celebrate the incredible soul that you are and the happiness you bring into my world.
textInChatBox: As you embark on another journey around the sun, I want you to know how deeply you are cherished and how much your presence means to me. Your laughter, your kindness, and your love make every moment brighter.
text2:
May this year be filled with love, laughter, and countless beautiful memories. 
I wish for your dreams to unfold and your heart to be filled with all the joy you deserve. 
You are not just a year older but a year wiser, more beautiful, and more amazing than ever.
text3:
Let's make this day as extraordinary as you are. 
Whether it's the simple pleasures or grand adventures, 
I look forward to sharing them all with you. 
Here's to another year of growth, love, and shared dreams.
text5Entry: Thank you for being the incredible person that you are and for being my partner in this beautiful journey of life.
outroText: Okay, now come back and tell me if you liked it.
replayText: Or click, if you want to watch it again.
